name: claude-obsidian
description: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Sets up a persistent, compounding wiki vault. Covers memory management, session notetaking, knowledge organization, and agent context across projects.

vault_path.title: Vault path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault

bootstrap_read_hot.title: Hot cache auto-read mode
bootstrap_read_hot.description: Controls when wiki/hot.md is injected at session start. Values: "always" (inject on every session start — ~2–3k tokens/turn baseline); "on-demand" (default — skip session-start injection; wiki skills read hot.md when they activate, so wiki sessions are unaffected); "never" (same hook behavior as on-demand; additionally signals to skills that they should avoid auto-reading hot.md). Change to "always" to restore the pre-v0.4.0 behavior.
